title: Malkiy'eliy #4440
definition:
Malchielites = Malchiel "my king is God"

 1) an Asherite and a descendant of Malchiel, the grandson of Asher
nasbUsage:
Definition: Malchielites = Malchiel "my king is God"

 1) an Asherite and a descendant of Malchiel, the grandson of Asher

    NASB:  desc. of Malchiel
